zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert C. Leeson於1528年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾懷特菲爾德時，他的父親Robert Leeson III19歲，母親Anne Aimee Pargiter24歲。他和Anne Lovett至少有2個女兒。他去世於1566年在英國諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾白費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Leeson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Layson
meanings: English (Kent): possibly a variant of   Leeson  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert C. Leeson was born in 1528, in Whitfield, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Robert Leeson III, was 19 and his mother, Anne Aimee Pargiter, was 24. He had at least 2 daughters with Anne Lovett. He died in 1566, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert C. Leeson est né en 1528, à Whitfield, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Leeson III, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Anne Aimee Pargiter, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Anne Lovett. Il est décédé en 1566, à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Byfield, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert C. Leeson 1528 in Whitfield, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Leeson III 19 und seine Mutter Anne Aimee Pargiter 24. Er hatte mit Anne Lovett mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1566 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert C. Leeson è nato il nel 1528 nel Whitfield, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Leeson III, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Anne Aimee Pargiter, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Anne Lovett. Morì nel 1566, nel Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert C. Leesonが1528年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィトフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert Leeson IIIは19歳，母Anne Aimee Pargiterは24歳であった。彼はAnne Lovettとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1566年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブイフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert C. Leeson(이)가 1528년 영국 노르섬프토실르 휘트필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Leeson III(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Aimee Pargiter(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Anne Lovett(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 영국 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 비필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert C. Leeson nasceu em 1528, em Whitfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Leeson III, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Anne Aimee Pargiter, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Anne Lovett. Ele faleceu em 1566, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert C. Leeson родился в 1528 г. в местности уитфиелд, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Leeson III было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Aimee Pargiter, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Anne Lovett. Он умер в 1566 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности бифиелд, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert C. Leeson nació en 1528, en Whitfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Leeson III, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Anne Aimee Pargiter, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Anne Lovett. Murió en 1566, en Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
